name: bazaar-indexer
description: Bazaar — Ormi subgraph indexing every match, move, audit verdict, and payout on Somnia.

scripts.deploy: graph deploy bazaar subgraph.yaml --node https://api.subgraph.somnia.network/deploy --ipfs https://api.subgraph.somnia.network/ipfs --deploy-key $SOMNIA_SUBGRAPH_DEPLOY_KEY --version-label v0.0.1
